note: Hand-authored novel layer + Expensify wire-protocol patches carried onto the 4.25.0 base. The Expensify API is non-RESTful (form-encoded bodies with authToken in the body, jsonCode in a 200 response), which the spec format cannot express; those request/response patches must be re-applied on every reprint until the generator gains a form-encoding option.

patches.summary: expense create/edit/quick/from-line send the API's canonical `created` field instead of `date` (the user-facing --date flag is unchanged).
patches.reason: Expensify ignores `date` on /RequestMoney and /EditMoneyRequest, so every back-dated expense landed as today. `created` is what sync reads back. THE HEADLINE BUG.
patches.validated_outcome: Dry-run of `expense create --date 2025-11-17` emits form field created=2025-11-17.

patches.summary: Client form-encodes every request (authToken + flattened fields, referer=ecash) and routes Integration-Server paths through requestJobDescription. The modeled Authorization header is dropped.
patches.reason: Expensify's New Expensify API expects application/x-www-form-urlencoded with authToken in the body, not a REST JSON+Authorization request. Without this no command reaches the API.

patches.summary: Client surfaces an in-body jsonCode 407 (returned with HTTP 200) as a clear re-auth error instead of an empty success.
patches.reason: Expensify returns HTTP 200 with jsonCode 407 on session expiry, so sync silently reported success/Synced 0 instead of an auth error.

patches.summary: Dry-run decodes and prints the form-encoded request body (authToken masked) instead of attempting a JSON pretty-print that silently shows nothing.
patches.reason: Bodies are application/x-www-form-urlencoded; the JSON-only dry-run printer showed no fields.

patches.summary: expense delete auto-resolves the IOU reportID + reportActionID required by /DeleteMoneyRequest from just the transactionID.
patches.reason: DeleteMoneyRequest with only transactionID returns jsonCode 200 but deletes nothing; it needs the IOU report action reference.
patches.validated_outcome: Reference live delete returned 21 onyx updates and the expense was gone.

patches.summary: `auth login --from-chrome` reads the freshest www.expensify.com authToken from Chrome's cookie store (newest by last_update_utc incl. the WAL sidecar; prefix-stripped v10 decrypt with PKCS#7 verification).
patches.reason: A fresh login leaves stale authToken rows behind; selecting by value length grabbed an expired one, and a not-yet-checkpointed token lives only in the WAL sidecar.

patches.summary: Hand-authored local-SQLite novel layer: sync, expense search/rollup/dupes/missing-receipts/quick/from-line/bulk, report draft, damage, plus honest stubs (watch/undo/close/admin policy-diff).
patches.reason: These transcendence features have no spec representation; they depend on the local store rebuilt in internal/store/store.go.
